Open live map

How it works

Stop guessing. Start finding.

01

See it. Live.

Status updates every few minutes from the owner — serving now, arriving soon, busy, or closed. Always know before you go.

02

Filter fast.

Open now. Your cuisine. Within walking distance. Sort by wait time. Find your match in seconds, not scroll-sessions.

03

Get there.

One tap opens directions in your maps app. No copying addresses. No Instagram DMs. Just go.

For truck owners

Run your truck smarter.

Go live in seconds. Keep customers updated without the manual posting. Turn every stop into revenue.

Claim your truck

Free to list · No credit card

For venues & event organizers

Book food trucks without the chaos.

Submit a request, get responses, confirm your vendor. No more DM threads and missed calls.

Request a truck
